title: Non-interactive DOM elements should avoid having the `tabIndex` property
description: Non-interactive DOM elements should not have the `tabIndex` propertyAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellaccessibilityreactNavigation using the Tab key should be restricted to elements on the page that users can interact with.Why is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoThe misuse of thetabIndexattribute can lead to several issues:Navigation Confusion: It can confuse users who rely on keyboard navigation, as they might expect to tab through interactive elements like links and buttons, not static content.Accessibility Issues: It can create accessibility problems, as assistive technologies provide their own page navigation mechanisms based on the HTML of the page. Adding unnecessary tabindexes can disrupt this.Increased Tab Ring Size: It unnecessaril
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Non-interactive DOM elements should avoid having the tabIndex property
